name: Hot Scallop & Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces fresh spinach leaves, washed and stemmed
4 ounces blue cheese, Gorgonzola, or feta cheese, crumbled
1/2 cup low calorie or regular Italian dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the spinach leaves among 4 plates.
2. Sprinkle the crumbled cheese over the spinach.
3. Rinse the scallops and pat them dry; cut large sea scallops in half horizontally.
4. Heat olive oil in a large frying pan over high heat.
5. When the oil is hot, add half of the scallops and cook, stirring often, until opaque through the center (test by cutting one). This should take 1-2 minutes.
6. Lift the scallops from the pan and set them aside.
7. Repeat steps 4-6 with the remaining scallops, adding more oil if necessary.
8. Bring the dressing to a simmer over medium heat.
9. Arrange the scallops on top of the spinach.
10. Drizzle with hot dressing and sprinkle with nuts.
11. Serves 4.
